hypothesis: Reproduce the accepted PR #549 SOTA (1.1194 BPB) on 8x H100 SXM to establish a verified delta anchor for improvement experiments.
promotion_gate: Full repro must land within +/-0.001 BPB of 1.1194 before any improvement experiments are allowed.

phases.description: Prepare the repo, virtualenv, zstandard, and flash_attn_interface on the 8x pod.
phases.failure_summary: Fix the bootstrap path before retrying the full PR #549 reproduction.

phases.description: Download the full sp1024 dataset cache before the 8x reproduction.
phases.failure_summary: Fix the data bootstrap issue before retrying the full PR #549 run.

phases.description: Run the published PR #549 record path on 8 GPUs.
phases.failure_summary: Investigate the exact PR #549 repro failure before trying improvement experiments.

success_summary: PR #549 full repro completed. Capture BPB, runtime, and artifact size in 09_RESULTS. This is the delta anchor for all improvement experiments.
manual_next_command: Write 09_RESULTS/repro_pr549_full.md, then decide which improvement experiments to run.
